ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.name: Avis Car Rental - Harry Reid Airport
ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.address: McCarran Rent-A-Car Center, 7135 Gilespie St, Las Vegas, NV 89119, USA

ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.author: Mary Ann L Baylosis
ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.text: Thanks so much Shirley Guzman you’re the best !!!   I am delighted to meet you and will definitely come back.  Thanks for the warm welcome and the touch of kindness. Thank you Avis for the excellent customer service.  Everyone check out Avis here at Las Vegas Nevada airport!!!  Thank you Portia John And Miles for the excellent customer service you guys are amazing 😝

ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.author: Garvit Tiwari
ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.text:
A heartfelt thank you to Shirley at Avis for delivering one of the best customer service experiences I’ve had. She was incredibly professional, patient, and genuinely committed to helping us. Despite a busy environment, she handled everything with a smile, ensured all our questions were answered, and made the entire rental process seamless.

What stood out most was her willingness to go the extra mile and her warm, welcoming attitude. Employees like Shirley are the reason customers keep coming back. Avis is fortunate to have such a dedicated team member representing their brand.

Thank you, Shirley, for making our journey start on such a positive note!

ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.author: Melanie Lee
ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.text:
She caught that my phone was forgotten in the van! Thank goodness. Thank you Cece!

Update: Cece was awesome, our experience with Avis, however, was a different story... Our van for EDC weekend died Friday morning. They sent someone to try to jump it and nothing. They didn't send a replacement van and the next day we had to go to Avis at the airport (Uber $) to get another van. It was rough. My friend ordered the van so I am not sure how it was rectified billing-wise, but it was our first EDC and to not have a safe, dependable ride there or back on day one was devastating. We missed opening ceremony and got a lift from strangers for $$$. I couldn't understand why getting a van to us was not possible and that we had to travel back to airport to get a replacement. This is a huge weekend and there needs to be better vehicle maintenance and resolution proceedings to prepare.

ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.author: C. Lasser
ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.text:
This Avis location is horrible. They never have my name on the board upon arrival, always have to go to the service counter, eating into my reservation time.
They always have excuses as to why the vehicle I reserved online is not available in person.
They attempt to up charge you stating “oh we don’t have your vehicle since stock is limited, but if you pay more we can get you a better vehicle.”
The vehicle’s themselves have been filthy with a tremendous amount of dings and scratches on the exterior and the interiors are grimy. The windows have to be examined closely for chips and cracks, or they will blame you for the damage.
Ensure your vehicle has a full tank before you leave, or have it properly documented or taken care of before you leave.
You always have to inspect and document your vehicle here, tire treads, windshield for chips, tank for gas, dings and scratches (especially on the roof) for your records.
Of all the Avis locations, this one sucks just a bit more than all the rest.

ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.author: Joshua Lidberg
ChIJL7BqEp3FyIARP_QZDyQ5HJI.text: Not sure why the reviews are so bad at this location. Flew in late at night, had a reservation. The check in at the counter was approximately 2 minutes, and the Tesla that I reserved was ready to go and charged over 80%. Charging is super fast on them as well. Don’t know why so many people are scared of EVs; I don’t own an electric vehicle myself, but charging this during my trip was a breeze. Smooth rental, no problems. Pick up is very convenient
